MY DEVELOPMENT APPROACH

Strategy 01

API-First Design

Design endpoints before writing code. Frontend & backend develop in parallel using mock APIs for faster delivery.

SwaggerPostmanOpenAPIREST
Strategy 02

Modular Architecture

Independent feature modules with clean separation. Each module owns its controller, service & repository layer.

Spring BootMVCMavenLayered
Strategy 03

Rapid Prototyping

Build a working MVP first. Quick iterations with fast feedback loops using modern tooling & containerisation.

ViteReactSpring BootMVP
Strategy 04

AI-Assisted Dev

Leverage AI tools for boilerplate generation, code review & automated testing. Ship faster with higher quality.

CopilotChatGPTClaudeStitch AIGeminiAI Tools
